_doc: Reference schema for ThreeJSON AI-related settings (llm with optional imageModel, agent, texture, asset). Browser demos use localStorage; tools/threejson-agent and tools/mcp-threejson each keep their own setting.json — see those packages' setting.example.json.

paths._doc: Agent runtime uses relativetRoot + redirectRelative (see tools/threejson-agent/setting.example.json). Example below is schema reference only.
